series_ref: GB metalayer: 5 gaps in the book<->code rail (the 'second derivatives')
one_line_intent: METALAYER (KM asked what we're missing): the rail is strong at make-it-once-correctly; the gaps are the SECOND DERIVATIVES — keeping truth true over time/depth/scale/loop. (1) LIVING reverse-drift: code->book has no BLOCKING gate, only the overnight Scout — sealed-book claims rot silently when code moves. (2) Receipt proves RENDER not CLAIM-TRUTH: need claim->named-passing-test traceability. (3) Inheritance DECLARED not VERIFIED: S5<-S3 signed-inheritance has no rail gate -> root errors propagate to 32 children. (4) Completeness != quality: lints say 'complete/0-thin' not 'good'; the series-flow-model reduces human touch -> THIS is where quality quietly erodes; must build a scaling substantive-quality signal INTO the flow-model. (5) Figure-8 not closed: no published->rail feedback loop. URGENT PAIR: #4 (fold into flow-model) + #1 (next rail-hardening after V3). Full: artifacts/GB_Metalayer_Rail_Gaps_2026-06-18.md. info/reflection card.
